faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: What are the subjects taught in BA?
faqs.answer:
The core subjects are usually the same. Though the electives differ. Some of the major ones taught are - English, History, Psychology, Political Science, Philosophy, Social work, Economics, Sociology, Anthropology, Rural Studies, and more. Bachelor of Arts is a 3 year program. It can be pursued full-time, part-time, or through distance learning.

faqs.question: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?
faqs.answer:
Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.
Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

placements.overview:
Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali is a private institute, established in 1998 in Mohali, Punjab. Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali is approved by NCTE, AICTE and BCI and offers a total of 64 courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in 12 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Dialysis Technology, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Full Time mode. Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 27,500 to 3,91,200. Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali has an annual seat intake of 1017 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Design. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

At the UG and PG levels, Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali course fee ranges between INR 27,500 to 3,91,200.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. The Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali course fee ranges between INR 27,500 to 3,91,200.

faqs.answer:
A:    Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates passed post graduation with 50% marks (5% relaxation for SC/ST candidates) from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.B.ComThe given marks is for commerce students who have passed 10+2 examination.
Students who have opted for two of the following commerce subjects in 10+2 : Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, Mathematics, Office Management and Secretarial Practice, Principle and Practice of Insurance, Tax Procedure and Practice should have minimum marks as 40% and 45% for other candidates.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard/SSC examination from any recognised board/council.B.E. / B.TechCandidates passed 10+2 with mandatory subjects along with one of the following subjects; Chemistry, Biology, Bio-technology, Computer Science from recognised board are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidates passed Bachelor's degree in any discipline from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and supportive staff.

review_content.Placements: My college is not so famous, but I can say more than average. If I am talking about placements, then not so many, but 3-4 companies came to the college for placement, and some of my classmates got jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is best. There is so much garden greenery. One drawback in my college is that there is no Wi-Fi in the college, and also not in the hostel. If I am talking about food, then it is also average, not so good, not so bad. Can be eaten and survive.
review_content.Faculty: As I already told you about the staff of my college, the staff is supportive and good, but as we know, some of the teachers are not so bad, but also not so good. But apart from this, teachers help you a lot with everything. This college makes students industry-ready.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical lab Sciences - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, value for money, and good faculty.

review_content.Placements: I am a final-year student in the Bachelor’s program in Medical Laboratory Sciences at Doaba Group Of Colleges. I belong to the 2022 batch. Our batch is the first to graduate from this college, as the course was newly introduced. From our course, lab technicians and lab scientists are hired by reputed hospitals and laboratories. Some of the well-known hospitals and labs that recruit include Apollo, Lal Path Labs, Fortis Mohali, Government Hospital Phase 6 Mohali, and Max Hospital Mohali.
review_content.Infrastructure: Regarding infrastructure, we have a separate building for our paramedical department, which has classrooms, a biochemistry lab, a microbiology lab, an operation theatre for practice, a radiology department, a library, a meeting room, a conference hall, etc. We have all the equipment required in the lab, along with various machines and instruments, fully calibrated. Wi-Fi is available. In hostels, there are shared rooms for two students, with good quality food in the mess. Moreover, extra activities such as NCC, NSS, Scout and Guide, basketball, football, volleyball, and athletics are available. An ambulance is always present on campus for any medical emergency.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: About my college and its placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not that good in Doaba Group of Colleges because there was little partnership with companies. But in other factors, like the study, it was satisfactory.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and teachers were friendly with students. They worked hard to give their best in the curriculum. I suggested others take admission if they wanted to pursue a degree, but the placements were not so good according to my preference.
review_content.Faculty: The curriculum was followed as assigned by Punjab Technical University, Kapurthala, Jalandhar. Exams were semester-based, and two assignments were assigned to students per subject in per semester. Other activities are also done like cultural, educational, and other activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very nice college if we want to take a degree but placements are average.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are average. It totally depends on students' skills. Companies like Infosys, Idea, etc., visit the college to recruit students. In our course, they taught blockchain concepts, cryptography concepts, and many new computer science technologies. New roles as per demand are added to the course curriculum.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi for hostel students only. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The library is very nice. Hostels are average. The quality of the food is average. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are also sports and games facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This is a good college for students to have a better future.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed. Managers and supervisors give various opportunities to students to achieve their aims to be successful in their lives and can be well settled in their future. Many students got placed in different companies that offer a handsome salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: They provide good food items in the canteen as well as in mess. The labs are well organized and all the equipment are available. So the student can learn by doing practical things more than by depending on the books. The library is always open for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I'm absolutely satisfied with fees and everything. It's best for economically middle-class students.

review_content.Placements: Internships depend on our academic performance, and if we aren't good enough, the college faculty members couldn't help in any way. Almost every student gets a well-paid job at the end of their degree course, but some students don't get jobs. But it's not the fault of our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every block has different facilities, so I don't know about them briefly. However, regarding the infrastructure and availability of assets, there is almost everything we need. Mainly for the sake of hygiene, all the washrooms and other important rooms are well furnished.

overview_faqs.question: Can Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali are UG Diploma, B.Ed, B.Com, After 1th Diploma, BCA, BBA, B.Pharma, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali has a rating of 3.7 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.9, 3.5, 4 and 3.8 as per reviews by students.

content.Placements: Placements were not that good in Doaba Group of Colleges because there was little partnership with companies. But in other factors, like the study, it was satisfactory.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good, and teachers were friendly with students. They worked hard to give their best in the curriculum. I suggested others take admission if they wanted to pursue a degree, but the placements were not so good according to my preference.
content.Faculty: The curriculum was followed as assigned by Punjab Technical University, Kapurthala, Jalandhar. Exams were semester-based, and two assignments were assigned to students per subject in per semester. Other activities are also done like cultural, educational, and other activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is a very nice college if we want to take a degree but placements are average.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are average. It totally depends on students' skills. Companies like Infosys, Idea, etc., visit the college to recruit students. In our course, they taught blockchain concepts, cryptography concepts, and many new computer science technologies. New roles as per demand are added to the course curriculum.
content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi for hostel students only. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The library is very nice. Hostels are average. The quality of the food is average. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are also sports and games facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college for students to have a better future.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students got placed. Managers and supervisors give various opportunities to students to achieve their aims to be successful in their lives and can be well settled in their future. Many students got placed in different companies that offer a handsome salary.
content.Infrastructure: They provide good food items in the canteen as well as in mess. The labs are well organized and all the equipment are available. So the student can learn by doing practical things more than by depending on the books. The library is always open for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best. There is so much garden greenery. One drawback in my college is that there is no Wi-Fi in the college, and also not in the hostel. If I am talking about food, then it is also average, not so good, not so bad. Can be eaten and survive.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, value for money, and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Regarding infrastructure, we have a separate building for our paramedical department, which has classrooms, a biochemistry lab, a microbiology lab, an operation theatre for practice, a radiology department, a library, a meeting room, a conference hall, etc. We have all the equipment required in the lab, along with various machines and instruments, fully calibrated. Wi-Fi is available. In hostels, there are shared rooms for two students, with good quality food in the mess. Moreover, extra activit...

reviews.review_heading: About my college and its placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good, and teachers were friendly with students. They worked hard to give their best in the curriculum. I suggested others take admission if they wanted to pursue a degree, but the placements were not so good according to my preference.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very nice college if we want to take a degree but placements are average.
reviews.review_text: There is free Wi-Fi for hostel students only. Classrooms are very neat and clean. The library is very nice. Hostels are average. The quality of the food is average. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. There are also sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college for students to have a better future.
reviews.review_text: They provide good food items in the canteen as well as in mess. The labs are well organized and all the equipment are available. So the student can learn by doing practical things more than by depending on the books. The library is always open for the students.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with fees and everything. It's best for economically middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: Every block has different facilities, so I don't know about them briefly. However, regarding the infrastructure and availability of assets, there is almost everything we need. Mainly for the sake of hygiene, all the washrooms and other important rooms are well furnished.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and Good Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this campus is quite good. All the rooms include witi, fans, lighting, study bench etc. You can get all the facilities in this campus. The classrooms and labs infrastructure is very good. The quality of the food in the canteen is good. Hostel are good. I haven't face any issue regarding infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for those who are average in studies.
reviews.review_text: The college had a huge infrastructure, but maintenance team and the administration doesn't spend money on the upbringing of the infrastructure which causes to have broken benches, toilets, and no filtered water inside the campus. The filters are installed but never cleaned. Rest all is good here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Doaba Group of Colleges, Mohali.
reviews.review_text: College buildings are good and well-maintained. Labs and classrooms are good. The library has books for each subject. The campus has two canteens and a stationery shop. Girls' and boys' hostels have separate lawns for activities. There are two messes available. The campus has separate grounds and courts for different sports.

college_info.college_name: Gurgaon College of Engineering: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Gurgaon College of Engineering admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Gurgaon College of Engineering:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gurgaon College of Engineering provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 75,000 to 2,93,880. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Gurgaon College of Engineering are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Gurgaon College of Engineering goes up to 696.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Gurgaon College of Engineering?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: Placements were good if you had the competency. Infrastructure was good and pedagogy could improve.

review_content.Placements: Placements offered by the college were mainly for technical roles. Companies like Aon Hewitt, Clearpath Technology, and Magneti Marelli visited the campus and recruited students. Placement packages ranged between Rs. 20,000-60,000 per month depending upon the profile and the company. Placements were not 100% as there was a competition among students and not many companies visited.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was fairly good. It had nice AC classrooms, well-equipped computer labs, canteen, and auditoriums. The campus had an ATM too. The library was huge and had many books for students. Quality of food served in the canteen was good, but there was scope to introduce variety in the menu. Also, hostel rooms were nice and equipped with AC.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college but there are no placements after the completion of the graduation.

review_content.Placements: At the time of admission they will tell you the big company name for placement, but in reality, a single industry is not coming for placements. They are not arranging any interviews if you got any marks it doesn't matter they don't provide you with any placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It is providing you with the best classrooms, medical facility and Wi-Fi. The labs are available, but there is no use of labs. The canteen is average. We can say that the infrastructure is average. There is no facility of games, and if you are in this college, they will give you burden.

overview_faqs.question: Is Gurgaon College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Gurgaon College of Engineering is a reputed institute for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Gurgaon College of Engineering has a review rating of 2.7 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 2.6 on campuslife, 1.8 on placements, 2.9 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Gurgaon College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A good college at verge of closing.

content.Placements: Placements are equally horrible as in all other private colleges. You will get to sit for about 5-7 companies and only a couple of them might be a job you would be interested in. Overall I must say placement is below average. Placement coordinator is a demotivating character. Only a few faculty members will guide you honestly and genuinely.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite attractive. Overall there are 3 blocks, classes are held in block A and B and Block has labs for mechanical and civil. Gardens are good, the ground is good, hostels are well-equipped. Greenery is commendable parking facility available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, average faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were subjective. It depends on your talent. But, the number of companies that visited were less because of the dooming engineering phase. Roles were offered in automobile, electronics, electrical, voice, non-voice and testing domains. Some of the students were placed, and some students were not. So, the placements were not 100%.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was pretty good. Buildings had all the required amenities. The facade was made of glass. The campus has an ATM, mess, canteen and a well-equipped ritzy computer lab. All the classrooms and offices are equipped with A/C. There were sports facilities and huge lawns. So overall, the infrastructure of the college was good.

content.Placements: At the time of admission they will tell you the big company name for placement, but in reality, a single industry is not coming for placements. They are not arranging any interviews if you got any marks it doesn't matter they don't provide you with any placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It is providing you with the best classrooms, medical facility and Wi-Fi. The labs are available, but there is no use of labs. The canteen is average. We can say that the infrastructure is average. There is no facility of games, and if you are in this college, they will give you burden.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Two companies visit the campus to recruit students from CSE or ECE. No placements for mechanical and civil students. Fees are also too much high as compared to the service provided. In my 4th year, I didn't see any company visiting the campus for placements of mechanical and civil engineering students.
content.Infrastructure: Have everything but not working properly. Wi-Fi is restricted, labs don't have models, either sports activities. The faculty members are not experienced, so they don't provide good knowledge about subjects and lab programs. The classrooms have the old pattern of study. The teaching staff are non-technical.

reviews.review_heading: A good college at verge of closing.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is quite attractive. Overall there are 3 blocks, classes are held in block A and B and Block has labs for mechanical and civil. Gardens are good, the ground is good, hostels are well-equipped. Greenery is commendable
parking facility available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, average faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was pretty good. Buildings had all the required amenities. The facade was made of glass. The campus has an ATM, mess, canteen and a well-equipped ritzy computer lab. All the classrooms and offices are equipped with A/C. There were sports facilities and huge lawns. So overall, the infrastructure of the college was good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements were good if you had the competency. Infrastructure was good and pedagogy could improve.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was fairly good. It had nice AC classrooms, well-equipped computer labs, canteen, and auditoriums. The campus had an ATM too. The library was huge and had many books for students. Quality of food served in the canteen was good, but there was scope to introduce variety in the menu. Also, hostel rooms were nice and equipped with AC.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college but there are no placements after the completion of the graduation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It is providing you with the best classrooms, medical facility and Wi-Fi. The labs are available, but there is no use of labs. The canteen is average. We can say that the infrastructure is average. There is no facility of games, and if you are in this college, they will give you burden.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Have everything but not working properly. Wi-Fi is restricted, labs don't have models, either sports activities. The faculty members are not experienced, so they don't provide good knowledge about subjects and lab programs. The classrooms have the old pattern of study. The teaching staff are non-technical.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of no placements for our batch. No clear vision for the students about career.
reviews.review_text: An excellent infrastructure, air-conditioned classrooms, nice canteen, greenery and clean grounds, nice hostel facility. The college buses are provided for the students who are coming from Delhi. The buses are air-conditioned. The toilets are neat and clean, and classes are cleaned on a daily basis. The medical facilities are easily provided on the campus.

The college has a good infrastructure, however, the academics are not good as the faculty members are not up to the level.  The college does provide all kinds of facilities related to labs, library, transport, sports, hostel etc. But it lacks the management which can bring good companies for placement to the campus. Overall, it is not a good choice. The college has a good infrastructure, however, the academics are not good as the faculty members are not up to the level.  The college does provide all kinds of facilities related to labs, library, transport, sports, hostel etc. But it lacks the management which can bring good companies for placement to the campus. Overall, it is not a good choice.

No placements, crowd is not good, faculty is also really bad. Only saving grace is good infrastructure. Apart from that nothing to look forward to. Apart from that, it's located 35 km from Gurgaon in a village, so location is also a deterrent. What I mean is not a good choice for anyone. overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This college is very good for studies.

content.Placements: The placement here is pretty decent. The average package offered here is 3-5 lacs per annum, and the highest package offered here is 7-10 lacs per annum. Almost 70% of students get placed in well-known companies. The placement coordinator is a very helpful person.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent. Very quiet and nature-friendly surroundings with well-maintained facilities and up-to-date equipment are there. The class room is well equipped with Wi-Fi access for everyone; laboratories have well-updated technologies; and libraries have well-stocked books.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Average college. Placements never came in 2015. Overall my decision for admission was right.

content.Placements: Almost 90% students were there as the classes were full. In 2015 the lowest package was 20000 and average was 100000. As the highest was 200000 for mostly biharis students those who haven't got scholarship. There was no company for internship as every students go out for internship. But at the time of admission they have told for internship. But that was fake .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was not so good. As it was like just a box type blocks. Wi-fi was not available at that time labs were available. Workshop were also there. Mess was for hostel. And canteen for discollar. Library was of around 3000 sq ft and had appprox 10000 books at my time for engineering.

highlights.summary: Founded in 2022, Dr. Preeti Global University is an university. It is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh. Dr. Preeti Global University provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 92 courses across specialisations such as Agriculture, Biotechnology, Botany, Chemistry and Civil Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Dr. Preeti Global University fees ranges between INR 12,000 to 2,40,000. Dr. Preeti Global University offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Mass Communication & Media. Dr. Preeti Global University offers all the campus facilities to students.

faqs.answer: A:    No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree. You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

answer.text: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:TV channelsCirculation and Public RelationsCentral Information ServiceLegal Affairs DepartmentJournalsAIR - All India RadioNews AgenciesPress Information BureauAdvertising agenciesBroadcasting companies.Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

admission_process.title: Dr. Preeti Global University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
Dr. Preeti Global University course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theDr. Preeti Global Universityapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Mass Communication and Media, Law, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Teaching and Education and Nursing, and more. To know about the eligibility of Dr. Preeti Global University courses, students can visit the website.

Dr. Preeti Global University fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Dr. Preeti Global University fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Dr. Preeti Global University admission:

faqs.question: Can I start a law practice without a Law degree or become a lawyer?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot become a lawyer without a Law degree.You mandatorily need to obtain degrees such as BA/BCom/BSc/BBA LLB or LLB in order to be a lawyer in India. To become a lawyer, one must first complete three-year or five-year LLB from a recognised university and possess degree certificate. Then, they must enrol themselves in local Bar Council of the concerned state and enrolled as an advocate. Within two years of the enrolment, they must appear and clear AIBE in order to be eligible to practise anywhere in India.

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid (RGUKT-N) was founded as a Nuzvid, Krishna district campus of RGUKT, a state university by an act of the legislature by Andhra Pradesh government in 2008. Following the creation of Telangana, RGUKT is split and the Andhra Pradesh campuses are brought under RGUKT - Andhra Pradesh.RGUKT-NUZIVID Fee Structure for Top Courses (Bachelor of Technology) is INR 40,000 per annum. RGUKT-NUZIVID M.Tech. (Master of Technology) fees is INR 52,000 per annum.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with best infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing B.Tech in my final year and am in Semester 2 of the final year. So far, around 45 percent of students in my branch have been placed. Around 10% of students are doing internships. The top recruiting company from the college is Infosys, where around 60 female students got placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 4 LPA, and the average package is around 6 LPA. The top roles offered in my college are Full Stack Web Developer and AI/ML Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well-equipped and have projector facilities. The college library contains a large number of books, which are helpful for students’ academics. In the hostel, one room is allocated for six members. All students get free beds. The hostel has a canteen facility. The quality of food is good. There are many sports and game facilities with strong encouragement from the administration.

review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are also good here, and the infrastructure is also good, with Wi-Fi in the labs and classrooms. The quality of the food is also fine. There is a hospital inside the campus only. There is a vast space in the ground for sports and games.

faqs.answer: The application fee for the M.Tech programme at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies Nuzvid is Rs. 200 for general candidates and Rs. 150 for SC/ST candidates. This fee is to be paid in any nationalized bank through a Demand Draft drawn in favor of "The Director, RGUKT (M.Tech Programme) Nuzvid" and payable at Nuzvid.

admission_overview.description: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid admission 2025 is both merit-based and entrance-based. It offers courses to candidates at both the UG and PG levels. These include- BTech and MTech. Both of these courses are offered in multiple specialisations at the university. Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid, has three residential campuses located at Basar, Nuzvid, and R K Valley in Telangana. Candidates who have applied for admission to the university can check their selection results online on the official website of the university.

eligibility_selection.title: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid Eligibility and Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid, eligibility varies from course to course. Candidates must pass Class 10 to apply for UG courses, and a graduation degree is required for PG courses in the required stream. Candidates seeking admission in the institute must ensure fulfilling this eligibility before applying for admission. Below are Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: - Courses

courses_table.eligibility: Pass Class 10/SSC or any other equivalent examinations from any recognized board
Pass graduation with a valid score from a recognised university/institute

faqs.answer: The programme offered by the RGUKT consists of a six year integrated course after the 10th class examination leading to a B.Tech. degree. The first part of the six-year course is a two-year Pre University Course (equivalent to (AP) Intermediate) followed by a second part of four-year Engineering Course. If you want to get additional information please check the college review on the college website.
faqs.question: Which course is Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies Nuzvid famous for?

faqs.answer: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid B.E. / B.Tech is offered in full time. The cost for the B.Tech in Chemical Engineering course at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies (RGUKT) Nuzvid is approximately INR 163,000 for the entire 4-year program. The fees are structured as follows: INR 43,000 is for the first year, and INR 40,000 for each subsequent year.
faqs.question: How much does B.Tech Chemical Engineering at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies Nuzvid cost?

admission_process.title: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers 17 programmes at the UG and PG levels in various fields, including Engineering and Design, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. The institute accepts exams, such as GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET, for admission to some specificRajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. Read more details around Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid admission in the following article.
Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, NuzvidDuration: The college offers UG courses for 4 years - 6 years. For courses at PG level, the duration is 2 years.

faqs.question: Can I apply for BTech course at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid if my Class 10 result is pending?
faqs.answer: Yes, a candidate can apply to BTech course at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid if Class 10 result is pending. The university may offer them provisional admission in this case. However, since admissions to this course is merit-based, the candidate must submit the marksheet and certificate of Class 10 once the results are declared. Only then the admission will be confirmed.

faqs.question: What is the duration of BTech course at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid?
faqs.answer: The duration of BTech course at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid is of six years. The course is divided into pre-university and Engineering course. For the initial two years, the pre-university course is taught to candidates and after this for the rest four years the Engineering course starts. Candidates can check the official website of the university for more details on the same.

courses_data.name: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Candidates interested in the fields related to Design and Engineering can enroll in theRajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid M.E./M.Techprogramme, which lasts for 2 years. Candidates are not required to appear for any entrance exams as the admission process is merit-based. The final shortlist for admission to the M.E./M.Tech programme is determined by the candidates' academic scores.

faqs.question: In how many years can I complete M.Tech at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid?
faqs.answer: MTech course is offered for a duration of two years at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid. Admissions to this course are entrance-based. It is offered in certain specialisations such as- Transportation Engineering (Civil) and Engineering Analysis and Design (Mechanical). Candidates the choose the one that suits their preference.

faqs.question: How much does M.Tech at Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies Nuzvid cost?
faqs.answer: M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering at RGUKT is a 2 years course at the PG level. The course offers admission to 24 students. The total tuition fee for RGUKT M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering is INR 1.20 Lakh. To get admitted to RGUKT M.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering course, applicants must meet the entry requirements - 50% in graduation.

faqs.question: Is Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid admission merit-based?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid admission is merit-based for the BTech course. Candidates are granted admission to this course on the basis of merit of Class 10/SSC examination. Candidates must have a valid score in these to apply for admission. While for M.Tech course, admission is entrance-based. The university accepts GATE and Andhra Pradesh PGECET for admissions to M.Tech course.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies Nuzvid for admission M.Tech?
faqs.answer: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Nuzvid (RGUKT-N) was founded as a Nuzvid, Krishna district campus of RGUKT, a state university by an act of the legislature by Andhra Pradesh government in 2008. reviews.review_heading: Best faculty with a great laboratory facility supports students for technical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best laboratories for research and for the learning process. Best opportunities for future research. Wi-Fi is available for the best online education. In the beginning, the best quality of food is there, but later it has drastically decreased but the more there is, the better.

reviews.review_heading: It helps rural students with a strict no-ragging campus.
reviews.review_text: We are provided laptops free of cost for the entire 6 years, which is the best facility for a Computer Science student. Wi-Fi is available in classrooms, hostels, and the library. The quality of food has improved recently and is quite nice.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with best infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college provides free Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well-equipped and have projector facilities. The college library contains a large number of books, which are helpful for students’ academics. In the hostel, one room is allocated for six members. All students get free beds. The hostel has a canteen facility. The quality of food is good. There are many sports and game facilities with strong encouragement from the administration.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with a happier life and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are also good here, and the infrastructure is also good, with Wi-Fi in the labs and classrooms. The quality of the food is also fine. There is a hospital inside the campus only. There is a vast space in the ground for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Growing institute with strong academics, good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course include free Wi-Fi and free laboratory equipment, central air conditioning, a well-equipped library with more books available, and improved canteen and medical facilities. There are also more sports and games available.

reviews.review_heading: The good satisfaction of the college.
reviews.review_text: The good infrastructure and maintenance are very clean, and the hygiene of our surroundings in the main campus is well maintained. The facilities offered in our campus are available in classrooms, including Wi-Fi and air conditioning based on weather conditions. The mess food is very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The good infrastructure and course are in very neat and excellent condition. The college provides Wi-Fi and air-conditioned classrooms. The quality is very nice and maintained very neatly, and the service. The canteen offered so many items.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available in the institution is top-level, and the classrooms contain central air conditioning. We have advanced laboratory facilities, and Wi-Fi is also available in our institution. The quality of the mess is good, and the canteen is reasonably priced.

reviews.review_heading: More than a value for money college.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have very good infrastructure. This includes Wi-Fi for each 2-3 classes, which are currently working. Good labs with decent equipment, classrooms, and libraries are good, clean, and peaceful. Hostel's cleanliness is maintained by workers. Apart from the taste of some food items, the mess is also good for tasty food. We have a clean and peaceful canteen where we spent some time with friends and bought some snacks. We have a separate hospital just for our campus, which provides ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college and no ragging. All resources are available. You only have to explore every one.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and very well-equipped labs are available. A central library is present for everyone up to 11:00 PM every day. All the facilities are good. The mess food needs to get some better, and sports are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Admission in our college is based on the merit of SSC. The fee is paid by the government.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is up to the mark, but the food in the mess is average. The Wi-Fi setup needs to be updated. The quality of food should be improved. Another drawback is that there are no updated laboratories for some engineering branches (not for our department).

reviews.review_heading: We have good infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi and lawns, so there is no problem with the internet. We have a projector, and we have a library which also has an internet connection, so it will be very useful to the students who are studying for the competitive exams.

reviews.review_heading: RJUKT NUZVID review about placements, hostel, faculty, infrastructure in labs.
reviews.review_text: Excellent labs with good infrastructure with good faculty having 7 to 8 years experience and did Masters in IIT colleges. Excellent hostels with good accommodation, excellent food will be provided. In the college we have NCC, NSS, and different types of sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to learn and provides an overall nice experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our department are quite good. We have proper labs, working equipment, and classrooms that are comfortable to sit in for long hours. The library is one of my favorite places because it is quiet and has all the books we need. Hostels are manageable, nothing fancy, but sufficient for student life. The mess food is decent most of the time, though it can get repetitive. Sports grounds are always busy, and we play almost every evening. Medical help is available whenever needed.

reviews.review_heading: My college experience.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are a little degraded as buildings are very old. Wi-Fi is not provided throughout the campuses. LAN connections can be requested to be arranged in our classrooms. Hostel facilities are not good. Bathrooms are not well-maintained. Selves and cupboards are broken and not repaired for long periods. But the rooms are good enough for a student. Mess food is good, and food court food is not worth the price.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Alpine Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Alpine Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in offline mode. Further, the fees structure for Alpine Institute of Technology courses stands around INR 37,500 to 96,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Alpine Institute of Technology offers Degree and Diploma courses including 7 UG and 4 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is wonderful.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students get placed in our college. I have no idea about placements because I'm in my 2nd year. But I think the lowest salary package is around 5 LPA - 6 LPA. The highest salary package offered is around 15 LPA - 20 LPA in our course. My course is electrical and I guess it's the best because, in this course, many jobs are available.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are okay and there is good-quality furniture for sitting. They have many fans and tube lights. Our college labs are not bad. In the college, the network does not work properly. We don't have Wi-Fi service, so it's a disadvantage of our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college is the best college.

content.Placements: The highest package of my college is 10 lacs per annum, the lowest package of my college is 2.5 lacs per annum and the average package of my college is 5 lacs per annum. And many companies come to my college. The maximum number of students are placed in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Alpine Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very good lab facilities. There are many labs and a canteen. It also provides a Wi-Fi facility because we are students of engineering, so we need a good internet connection. Signal baker is a place in our college.

reviews.review_text: The library is not that good and labs are also not that big, with a small amount of computers. Classrooms are not that awesome. Wi Fi connection is available but not very fast. The hostel is small with 4 members in one room. The mess food is just okay sometimes the taste is poor. Sports and games are not given much importance.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good quality study.
reviews.review_text: A well-performing digital lab, especially a robotics lab, is one of the main features of the lab, along with providing Wi-Fi facilities. A global library is provided. Good-quality food was provided by the college cafeteria. Sports meets, a well-arranged M.A. room for sick students, etc. are there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure provided in our course are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a library, a canteen, a mess, medical facilities, sports, and games. Wi-Fi connection is good and useful. Labs and the library are good.

admission_overview.college_name: Samalkha Group of Institutions Course Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility and Last Dates

admission_process.title: Samalkha Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Samalkha Group of Institutions offers various courses like BTech, BTech LEET, PGDM, MBA, and BBA. Eligible candidates can benefit from highly experienced faculty delivering education in various fields, including Aeronautical, Automobile, Electronics, Mechanical, Computer Science, Civil, and Structural Engineering. SGI's full-time mode ensures students acquire comprehensive knowledge and skills in their chosen disciplines.

For Samalkha Group of Institutions admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Samalkha Group of Institutions course admissions 2025:

Samalkha Group of Institutions admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around SGI admissions 2025:
Step 1: Samalkha Group of Institutions Application Process 2025

The admission process at Samalkha Group of Institutions for the academic year 2025 begins with the application process. Prospective candidates are required to download the application form from the official website of the institution. Upon completion, the filled application form needs to be submitted either via post or in person to the designated department at SGI. Additionally, candidates must pay the application and entrance test fees online and attach the pay slip along with two copies of the online bank challan to the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
Admission to the various UG and PG courses offered at Samalkha Group of Institutions is based on a combination of merit and entrance tests. The selection criteria vary depending on the course:
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

Following the completion of the selection rounds, qualified candidates will be called for counselling sessions specific to their respective courses. Subsequently, SGI will release merit lists in multiple rounds, featuring the names of selected candidates. Students whose names appear on the merit list must pay the required fees to secure their seats in the desired course.

headings.text: Samalkha Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria
Samalkha Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

lists: For MBA/PGDM: Candidates must hold a graduation degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks (47.75% for SC/ST candidates). Selection is based on scores obtained in MAT, XAT, or CAT.
For BE/BTech: Applicants should have passed Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate marks (42.75% for SC/ST candidates). Selection is based on performance in JEE Main or HSTES entrance exams.
For BBA: Candidates must have completed Class 12 with a minimum of 40% aggregate marks. Selection is merit-based.
For BCA: Eligibility criteria include passing Class 12 exams. Admission is merit-based.
For ME/MTech: Candidates need a graduation degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks (47.75% for SC/ST candidates). Selection criteria are not specified.

reviews.review_heading: Learning life and campus experience.
reviews.review_text: The department has satisfactory infrastructure to support academic needs. Classrooms are spacious, ventilated, and equipped with projectors and Wi-Fi connectivity. Laboratories are adequately furnished with essential equipment as per the college syllabus. The library provides sufficient textbooks.

reviews.review_heading: A positive college experience.
reviews.review_text: The department has a well-developed infrastructure system and supports academic needs. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with a projector and Wi-Fi connectivity. Laboratories are adequately furnished with essential equipment as per the course syllabus.

reviews.review_heading: An enriching academic experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-maintained and well-structured. Classrooms are equipped with smart boards and projectors. Lab facilities provide many software programs. The hostel facilities are safe, clean, and provide secure accommodation. Although my college provides basic amenities facilities also.

reviews.review_heading: About campus life and learning experience.
reviews.review_text: The department has satisfactory infrastructure to support academic needs. Classrooms are spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with projectors and smart classroom boards. The library provides sufficient textbooks, reference books and journals, and access to digit learning resources.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college provides a good learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-maintained and well-structured. Hostel facilities are good. Along with many basic amenities such as Wi-Fi and free housekeeping. Hostel is decent, clean, and safe. Basic medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: This is about academics, exposure, and student experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Campus has a pleasant vibe and a good environment. Each department is fully equipped with smart classroom systems. Laboratories have many software programs and are well-maintained. The hostel provides safe, clean, and secure accommodation with many facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides excellent facilities for students’ overall growth and development.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides separate centrally air-cooled residential facilities for both boys and girls. The hostel includes a common room with a TV. The mess is hygienic, and the food is very tasty with lots of variety. Safety is a priority, with 24/7 wardens acting as local guardians for the residents. Without permission, no one can enter the premises. In short, SGI provides a safe and secure environment.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the internship and placement.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is well maintained and modern. Campus has classrooms with proper lighting and ventilation. Smart classrooms, well equipped laboratories, a seminar hall, and a big library are available. A variety of books and journals are in the library. Food in the hostel is acceptable. A large variety of food is offered. College also provides medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A student's perspective on academic and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-maintained and well-equipped with smart boards and a smart classroom system. The quality of food they provide us in the hostel is good. The food is tasty. Every day we are getting different types of dishes. The canteen is near our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My college journey experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-maintained and well-structured. Labs and classrooms are equipped with smart boards and projectors. Hostel facilities provided are good. They provide us with good food in proper and hygienic manner. Mess, canteen, and medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: My college journey overall with good experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-maintained and well-structured. The facilities provided by the college are fine. Labs are equipped by no. of instruments. Our classrooms are equipped with smart boards and projectors. The quality of food is good, and mess is fully hygienic. They provide separate medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: BBA course and my college life.
reviews.review_text: It is a fully Wi-Fi campus. Its infrastructure is too large, and its maintenance is also good. Here, teachers give lectures via PPT presentations through projectors. Labs are fully equipped. In the library, we get both options of offline and online modes. Well-furnished hostel facilities are available for students. In short, there are separate and secure hostels.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college is very good, and on the other hand, the faculty is very helpful.
reviews.review_text: As a first year BBA student, my experience with the college facilities and infrastructure has been quite positive so far. The campus is well-maintained, and the environment is student-friendly. Our classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors and Wi-fi, which makes it easier to follow lectures and presentations. The college provides decent infrastructure for academic and day-to-day needs.

reviews.review_heading: Samalkha Group of institutions helps students prepare for the future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well. From the academic building to the library block, everything is maintained properly. The college campus is so green and clean we have all the facilities like the library, labs, and canteen. The Samalkha Group of institutions has various sports facilities like indoor games and outdoor games. The college conducts games and competitions for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college academics are strong with supportive faculty and regular assessments.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is large, and B. Tech students have their separate blocks. We have a common library for all students. The campus offers amenities like air-conditioned classrooms, a good library, a canteen, hostels, and sports grounds. In my classroom, all facilities are available, including a smart board and projector.

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college for engineering and good placements.

content.Placements: In my college, the placement rate is about 60–70%. The highest package offered was 5 lakhs per year, and the lowest was 2 lakhs and the average package offered was 2.5 to 3 lakhs annually. The top recruiting companies are RSPL Ltd., Oppo, and Riding Engineering pvt. Ltd. Around 60% of students got internships in mechanical engineering diplomas. The top roles offered were assistant engineer and quality head.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus of Naraina groups was very good, neat, and clean. Free Wi-Fi is available on college campuses and hostels. Our campus enforces a strict dress code. A smart classroom facility is also available. The library has a collection of all books related to the course, and every student got a library card to access books. Our hostel quality was very good. Strict security protocol is there for all hostel students. Mess is provided for all hostelers. Pick-up and drop-off facility from hostel to college are free of charge for hostel student. A canteen is available for all students. Medical facility is available for students in our Naraina Medical College and Hospital. Regular social activities and sports are also available.

The top role offered in our course is a graduate trainee. The highest salary package offered here was 3 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of the facilities provided in the hostel building is good, and there is an attached washroom in every room. Hostel rooms have an accommodation capacity of 2 students, while some have 3 students also. The quality of the food served in the mess is below average. Medical facilities and sports facilities are fine. Canteen facilities were good.

faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. hostel.description:
Naraina College of Engineering and Technology's hostel has spacious, hygienic, well-ventilated and fully furnished rooms along with the LAN connectivity. The hostel also provides STD facility.
Single room accommodation is given to the final year and post graduate students. They are also permitted to use their own computers in their own rooms.

library.description: Naraina College of Engineering and Technology's library has a collection of over 55000 books, periodicals, national and international journals and CD-ROMs covering all aspects of academic studies and research material. The college library uses latest software like SAS, PROWESS, ORACLE etc. to enable work on data analysis, web technologies and software designing training grounds for building professionals.

individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its placements, infrastructure, and faculty members.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good. Wi-Fi was not enabled, but library access was very good. They provide a very good number of books and internet access. Laboratories were also good. Hostel facility was not available on campus. Our canteen was average.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were good. They were passionate to learn new things, and they were well-qualified. Our course curriculum was as per GTU which was relative to industries. Pass percentage was as per GTU criteria. The teaching method was also good.

hostel_campus.college_name: Gujarat Power Engineering and Research Institute Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with well infrastructure, quality teaching, and location of college.
reviews.review_text: Here, many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, auditorium, sports ground, and library are available. All are good quality infrastructure. Wi-Fi speed is decent, and labs have working computers. There are many classrooms (30+). We also have medical facility for emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: This college has good faculty, better infrastructure, and good sports and lab facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good Wi-Fi speed of around 150 mbps, a very good library, and most of the books are available in our library. You can also ask the librarian if a book is not available in the library. Computers are with i7 and i5 the latest processors, and 8 GB of RAM. We also have 1 lab for developers. The food quality in the canteen is average, and prices are higher. Most of the sports equipment is available.

reviews.review_heading: Not a good college for computer students. Less facilities and the worst canteen ever.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classroom and library are available. Ground is full of grasses and there are not many students in the college. This institute doesn't feel like a college, it feels like a government school. The canteen is very bad. I was not supposed to stay in hostel but students who were staying in hostel told me that hostel facility is not good and sports equipment are less.

reviews.review_heading: Great Moments in College Life.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi, Labs and Library are available in the college. Average quality of canteen and sports games is provided to the students. Free Wi-Fi is available in the campus but its speed has trouble in mobiles. Food quality in the canteen is better than average.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its placements, infrastructure, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. Wi-Fi was not enabled, but library access was very good. They provide a very good number of books and internet access. Laboratories were also good. Hostel facility was not available on campus. Our canteen was average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best teaching faculty and offers many courses to choose from and a huge canteen.
reviews.review_text: We have fast Wi-Fi available, and there are different kinds of books available Library is somewhat huge and peaceful also we have huge and smart classes. There are 3 huge computer labs and equipment for every branch. We don't have hostels yet.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and environment.
reviews.review_text: For computer science, there were 3 different computer labs, separately for 1st year, 2nd and 3rd-year students. The first 2 labs are database labs, and the 3rd lab is an advanced computer lab for final years. Labs are pretty huge, and all Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs and AC are available. We also have a huge library. All classrooms have projectors.

reviews.review_heading: The college has excellent faculty members and good surrounding.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of GPERI is great and value for money as it has a proper canteen, large corridors, good enough library and excellent laboratories. The only thing where GPERI management lacks is that they don't have enough sports area, just a big ground, but we are never allowed to go. So, that's a minus point.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gujarat Power Engineering and Research Institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All types of labs are available in our college, and they are the best. All types of prototypes are available. It has great land and structure. The labs have good instruments for experiments. Lab facilities are good. Good CNC machines and 3D prototyping machines are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gujarat Power Engineering and Research Institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All types of labs are available in our college. The functioning of all labs is the best. All types of prototypes are available. It is a great land and structure. The college has good instruments for experiments. Lab facilities are good. Good CNC machines and 3D prototyping machines are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a great source of knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides great amenities, along with great infrastructure. Facilities are good, and the canteen is good in terms of food as it provides healthy and tasty food. The environment in the canteen is good, and there is an open ground for programmes, social gathering and sports, which make us healthier. The library is highly equipped with books of different authors.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is great. The college is not that good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is upto the mark. The classrooms are well ventilated. There is Wi-Fi facilities in college. The library is the most useful resource of the college. It contains fair amount of books. There is no hostel facilities available. The quality and variety of food in canteen is poor.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are good. Placements of the previous batch were high.
reviews.review_text: The college has elegant architecture. Siemens centre of excellence, well-established laboratories, and MOOC courses are available in the college. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college provides transportation facilities. A hygienic cafeteria is available. We don't have any hostel facilities, but they will be available soon.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good and highly knowledgeable faculty members and attractive library.
reviews.review_text: There are too many facilities available like good classrooms, a library, canteen, labs, and playground provided for students to improve their skills of students. In the hostel, there are many facilities like good food, first-aid kits per room, and indoor games rooms available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of  Gujarat Power Engineering and Research Institute.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was enabled with Wi-Fi. It had a very big infrastructure, neat and clean labs with air-conditioners, clean classrooms, and a very big library. Hostel provided was very good but served average quality food in the canteen.
