fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. College offers B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions course fee ranges between INR 90,000 to 12,84,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: This is a tier 2 college, which is below average.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of B.Tech of batch 2024-2028, 65 to 70 percent of students got placed from our college from every batch. The highest package offered is 50 LPA by Microsoft (off-campus). The lowest package is 4 LPA-5 LPA by companies like TCS and Wipro. Top recruiting companies are those companies that are product-based, like Amazon and Microsoft. 60 to 70 percent of students get internships from TCS, Infosys, and Wipro via LinkedIn.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our course, mostly labs have Wi-Fi services available, but classrooms lack these services, as there are a very low number of classes that are equipped with all the important electronics like projectors, speakers, or a TV. Hostels and mess are just below average, and the mess food is not even tasty to eat with a happy mood. The canteen food is good in this college. Sports and games are good with zonal competitions in our colleges and in-house competitions.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My college life journey.

review_content.Placements: No, college does not provide internship opportunities, but placements are provided as various companies come to recruit students in best companies. Many companies like TCS, Accenture, Mendenious, Learning Routes, Planet Spark, and various EdTech or sales companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Sports labs and many activities are conducted, like management games, to enhance skills of students. Yes, in my college there is separate boys and girls hostel in the college campus, and there is very good infrastructure and safety around the college.

review_summary.college_name: MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college provides a good learning environment, supportive faculty, and average placements.

content.Placements: Placement in our course is decent but not exceptional. Around 55–60% of students from my batch get placed through campus drives. The highest package is approximately 20 LPA, the average is around 3–4 LPA, and the lowest is about 2 LPA. Some students also secure internships at companies like local IT firms, startups, and service-based companies.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is satisfactory for a technical course. Classrooms are spacious. They are equipped with basic teaching aids. Computer labs function properly. Along with enough systems for practical sessions. Library has sufficient academic books and study space. Hostel facilities are average but manageable. Rooms are clean. Food quality is acceptable with limited variety.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Ya, those who are from average families definitely can take admission.

content.Placements: According to me, about 55-60 per cent of students get placed. This year, the highest package is about 46 LPA, the lowest is about 3.5 LPA, and the average is 7-8LPA. About 56-60 percent of students got internships. The top recurring companies are Wipro, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, no AC, only fans are available in classrooms, and the library was also available, and the quality is good, not very bad, it is below average in all things. The main problem that every student faces in this college is that its attendance is 90 percent, which is very bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This is a tier 2 college, which is below average.

content.Placements: I am a student of B.Tech of batch 2024-2028, 65 to 70 percent of students got placed from our college from every batch. The highest package offered is 50 LPA by Microsoft (off-campus). The lowest package is 4 LPA-5 LPA by companies like TCS and Wipro. Top recruiting companies are those companies that are product-based, like Amazon and Microsoft. 60 to 70 percent of students get internships from TCS, Infosys, and Wipro via LinkedIn.
content.Infrastructure: In our course, mostly labs have Wi-Fi services available, but classrooms lack these services, as there are a very low number of classes that are equipped with all the important electronics like projectors, speakers, or a TV. Hostels and mess are just below average, and the mess food is not even tasty to eat with a happy mood. The canteen food is good in this college. Sports and games are good with zonal competitions in our colleges and in-house competitions.

individual_reviews.title: My college life journey.

content.Placements: No, college does not provide internship opportunities, but placements are provided as various companies come to recruit students in best companies. Many companies like TCS, Accenture, Mendenious, Learning Routes, Planet Spark, and various EdTech or sales companies.
content.Infrastructure: Sports labs and many activities are conducted, like management games, to enhance skills of students. Yes, in my college there is separate boys and girls hostel in the college campus, and there is very good infrastructure and safety around the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My institute review of MPEC.

content.Placements: Placements are average, like 4 to 5 LPA. Companies like Black Range, Sopra Steria, and Informatica offer decent packages. A few companies, like Juspay and Razorpay, came in the past and gave good offers. In Razorpay, one student was placed from our college. Companies mainly offer roles like ASE, software engineer trainee, and SDE.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure is overall good. Many students are shifting to the hostel this year. Wi-Fi is also available, which has good speed, and classrooms are a little bit warm, especially during the summer. The number of students is also increasing every year.

admission_process.title: MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions considers scores in MPGI Entrance Test, UP B.Ed JEE, and CBSE 10th for admission to specific courses.MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutionsoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 54 months - 5 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 90,000 - 12,84,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 1,22,400 - 1,33,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

hostel_campus.college_name: MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Maharana Pratap College of EngineeringReviewed on 16 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college provides a good learning environment, supportive faculty, and average placements.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is satisfactory for a technical course. Classrooms are spacious. They are equipped with basic teaching aids. Computer labs function properly. Along with enough systems for practical sessions. Library has sufficient academic books and study space. Hostel facilities are average but manageable. Rooms are clean. Food quality is acceptable with limited variety.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Maharana Pratap Engineering CollegeReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Ya, those who are from average families definitely can take admission.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, no AC, only fans are available in classrooms, and the library was also available, and the quality is good, not very bad, it is below average in all things. The main problem that every student faces in this college is that its attendance is 90 percent, which is very bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Maharana Pratap Engineering CollegeReviewed on 22 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is a tier 2 college, which is below average.
reviews.review_text: In our course, mostly labs have Wi-Fi services available, but classrooms lack these services, as there are a very low number of classes that are equipped with all the important electronics like projectors, speakers, or a TV. Hostels and mess are just below average, and the mess food is not even tasty to eat with a happy mood. The canteen food is good in this college. Sports and games are good with zonal competitions in our colleges and in-house competitions.

reviews.review_heading: My college life journey.
reviews.review_text: Sports labs and many activities are conducted, like management games, to enhance skills of students. Yes, in my college there is separate boys and girls hostel in the college campus, and there is very good infrastructure and safety around the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Maharana Pratap Engineering CollegeReviewed on 28 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My institute review of MPEC.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is overall good. Many students are shifting to the hostel this year. Wi-Fi is also available, which has good speed, and classrooms are a little bit warm, especially during the summer. The number of students is also increasing every year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Maharana Pratap Engineering CollegeReviewed on 17 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in my college or department include providing Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a big library, as well as Physics and Chemistry labs. The quality of the facilities available in my college, such as the hostel, is good, and good quality food is available in the mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Maharana Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 11 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharana Institute of Professional Studies.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. There are big grounds and the best canteen. The mess is also very good, and they give high priority to hygiene.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Maharana Pratap College of EngineeringReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I recommend this college but not the hostel of the college.
reviews.review_text: My friend told me that there are not many facilities in the hostel. Even she brings her own cooler into the room. There are very high fees in college. Wi-Fi is available, and library access is not available 24X7. Labs are good. Canteen food is good. There are 3 canteens in the college. Mess food is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Maharana Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 4 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Quite good infrastructure and supportive faculty with a good scope of better placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are not that much up to date because sometimes they become of low range, which affects our placement drive assessment and virtual interviews. The facilities in other departments are also not that good because they never consider the students urgent matters.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Maharana Pratap Engineering CollegeReviewed on 1 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The latest MPEC feedback for 2025.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, the institute has an eco-friendly environment, including a herbal garden inside the campus and a huge ground for sports activities, as the institute promotes and participates in various inter-regional sports activities. For the safety of students and all members, there's a proper security system guarded by security personnel on a routine basis. For emergency medical situations, it has a medical hospital inside the campus, along with a dental college and other medical ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Maharana Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I chose B.Tech CSE due to my interest in IT. The best thing is basic exposure to programming.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average. Labs and classrooms are usable but not modern, Wi-Fi is limited, and the library is okay. Hostel facilities are basic with simple food, average mess quality, and limited sports facilities. Medical support is minimal, so it is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Maharana Institute of Professional StudiesReviewed on 23 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good college for professional courses with decent placement support. Vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-stocked library, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The hostel rooms are generally decent, with two students per room, and include basic facilities like a bed, table, and almirah. The college has a doctor's clinic on campus for basic medical aid. For sports, there are facilities for outdoor games like cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because it provides a good environment for learning.
reviews.review_text: My college's infrastructure is excellent, and the classrooms are also very good, but Wi-Fi connection is not provided for students. The labs are good, but some computers do not work properly. The library has good books available. I am not a hosteler, but my friend is a hosteler, and they told me the food quality is not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Maharana Pratap Engineering CollegeReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: There are good placements in my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college is something better than others. It is more valuable due to its facilities. There are many facilities in the hostel, and the food quality is good. There is a good thing which I personally like, a timing schedule for the mess is allotted for all the students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Maharana Pratap Engineering CollegeReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My journey at MPGI: Learning, living, and looking ahead.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are very good. My campus is on 50 acres of land. The facilities offered in the hostel are Wi-Fi, free electricity, medical support, mess, sports, and games. The food quality was very good, and hygiene was also maintained in the mess.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about MPGI - Maharana Pratap Group of Institutions

likes.text: The top recruiting companies like HCL, Amazon, TCS, Coforge, Infosys, Wipro, Walmart, Cognizant, and many more.
They recruit students and offers positions like software developer, QA, Software engineer etc.

likes.text: Our college provides us with all facilities like an auditorium, classrooms have projectors for better learning, Wi-Fi is enabled in computer labs and ethernet support for fast networks.
Our boys and girls hostels are very good and hygienic; there is a large field for sports and sports activities; and our cafeteria has a very vibrant atmosphere .

Teachers and faculty members are well qualified and educated, Although everyone of them have different teaching style but still they try to deliver their best.

college_info.intro: The university also offers several diplomas, PG diplomas, and PG certificate courses in Veterinary and Animal Sciences. Apart from the regular degree programmes and short courses, Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University offers several courses in distance learning. Additionally, the university extends a range of scholarships, fellowships, and assistantships to meritorious students. Candidates belonging to financially backward families are also eligible for several scholarships offered by the university.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses. It also offers diplomas, PG diplomas, and certificate courses. The duration of BVSc & AH is five-and-a-half years and BTech is of four-year duration. PG courses are of two years each, whereas PhD programme is of three-year duration. The duration of UG diploma, PG diploma, and PG certificate courses varies from one year to two years. The table below lists the various KVASU courses along with their specialisations and fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get admission in Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University with 70% in graduation.The eligibility criteria for admission to the MVSc programme at Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University is a Bachelor's degree in Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry recognised by the University with an OGPA of 6.0/10 or equivalent OGPA/equivalent percentage of 50% marks in traditional system. For SC/ST candidates, the OGPA shall be 5.5/10 or equivalent. For admission to the BVSc & AH degree course, a candidate should have passed the 10+2 or equivalent examination with Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and English with a minimum of 50% marks secured from a recognised board of the country. They should have also cleared All India Pre-Veterinary Test (AIPVT) or some state-specific veterinary test.
faqs.question: Can I get into Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University with 70% in graduation?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) conducts the All India Entrance Examination for Admission (AIEEA) to offer admission to undergraduate and postgraduate courses in agriculture and allied sciences, including veterinary science. The ICAR score is relevant for admission to the M.V.Sc. course at Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University. 25% of the seats in each department are reserved for ICAR applicants who pass the admission exam.
faqs.question: Is ICAR required for Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University?

faqs.answer: A:    The All India Entrance Examination for Admission (AIEEA) is administered by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) to provide admission to undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in agriculture and associated fields, including veterinary science. The ICAR score is required for admission to Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University's M.V.Sc. program. 25% of the seats in each department are reserved for ICAR applicants who pass the admission exam.

faqs.answer: Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University offers a two-year Master of Science (MSc) programme in six specialisations. The mode of education for this programme is full-time. The selection of candidates is done basis their performance in the entrance exam conducted by the university followed by a personal interview. The table below lists various specialisations offered by Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University under the MSc programme along with their eligibility, seat intake: SpecialisationEligibilityBiostatistics (10 seats)BSc in Statistics/ Mathematics with Statistics as a subsidiary subjectQuality Control in Dairy Industry (6 seats)BSc in Dairy Science/ Food Technology/ Food Microbiology/ Biotechnology/ Food science/ Nutrition & Dietetics/ Chemistry/ MicrobiologyBiochemistry & Molecular Biology (15 seats)BSc in Biochemistry/ Biotechnology/ Microbiology/ Chemistry/ Dairy Science/ Zoology Applied Microbiology (10 seats)BSc in Microbiology/ Zoology/ Botany/ Biotechnology/ Veterinary Science/ AgricultureAnimal Biotechnology (15 seats)BSc/ BTech in Biotechnology or Dairy Technology/ equivalent bachelor's degree in Life Science subjectsWildlife Studies (10 seats)BSc in Biosciences (Botany/ Zoology/ Veterinary Science/ Forestry/ Poultry Production/ Business Management)

review_summary.college_name: KVASU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best things in my life began with this college. Forever grateful.

content.Placements: The most important course taught here is veterinary science and animal husbandry. This is a 5-year course curriculum, including an internship. Every year, almost 125 students are admitted to the college for UG. The admission procedure is based on the entrance ranking.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides us with a large campus and beautiful areas covered with trees and scenery. There is a good playground where students can play football, cricket and other sports. There is a good library for students to refer to for their doubts. Wi-Fi is available in every hostel and also inside the college; it's password-protected. Food is available near the hostel mess for which additional fees should be paid.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 0
individual_reviews.title: College has a good infrastructure, but I am slightly dissatisfied with the placements.

content.Placements: Placement cell is very less active in our college. Only 10% of the total batch got placed. The top company visiting for placements was Amul. They only offered the roles in sales and marketing department. All the students got internships in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are smart having Wi-Fi connections in both college and the hostel. Labs have good facilities with highly sophisticated equipments. Food available in the mess and the canteen is of good quality. Gym, sports and games are highly appreciated. Multiple clinics are located nearby.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and good placements.

content.Placements: The BVSC and AH course allows you to achieve your goal to become a doctor and this college is well-equipped to mould us to become the best doctors. I am sure that None of you will be jobless after the course, as the importance of a veterinarian is increasing day by day in our world.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are smart classrooms and good-quality lectures are offered by most of the professors. The library in the college is enough to cover all the doubts during the syllabus. The hostel is running under students' and mess which means we can suggest the food and good quality food is provided. The college has experienced physical education professors and is well-equipped with materials needed for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatified because basic needs are not available in this college.

content.Placements: Students are selected under the KEAM entrance exam in companies like Milma, Nestle, Amul, etc. Other milk and food companies provide job opportunities. We don't have any internship program in our college. They do not provide any job requirements. Dairy extension officer is the top role.
content.Infrastructure: It is a small college with no basic facilities. Hostels are available but the mess is not available. Lab, library, and classrooms are available. Rooms are small, but they are improving. Wi-Fi and other facilities are only for office use. Hostel is very congested. Classrooms are very small.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for studies but not in terms of placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.8 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our college were Amarai, Milky Mist, Milma, etc. Roles offered were technical superintendent, quality analyst, etc. About 10% of the students got internships, and internships are mandatory here.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure, and there were almost all labs like microbiology, computer lab, chemistry and technology labs. Classrooms were neat and clean. One of the main attractive things in our college is its good library, which has books that help students to learn better. There were separate hostels for both boys and girls, and the food available at the hostel has good quality. The college also gives importance to sports.

faqs.question: Does Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University accept AIEEA for BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (KVASU) accepts AIEEA-UG for admission to its B.Tech. in Dairy Technology program. The admission to the B.Tech. (Dairy Technology) course is regulated by the Commissioner for Entrance Examinations of Kerala (CEE) through Kerala Engineering Entrance Exam (KEAM) and ICAR through the AIEEA-UG entrance examination. Candidates who have passed Higher Secondary Examination, Kerala, or Examinations recognised as equivalent thereto, with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Chemistry as one of the optional subject with at least 45% marks put together in the above subjects are eligible for admission.

faqs.question: What is the ICAR score for B.Sc Kerala Veterinary & Animal Sciences University?
faqs.answer: The All India Entrance Examination for Admission (AIEEA) is administered by the Indian Council of Agricultural Research (ICAR) to provide admission to undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in agriculture and associated fields, including veterinary science. The ICAR score is required for admission to Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences University's M.V.Sc. program. 25% of the seats in each department are reserved for ICAR applicants who pass the admission exam.

reviews.review_text: The classrooms are smart classrooms and good-quality lectures are offered by most of the professors. The library in the college is enough to cover all the doubts during the syllabus. The hostel is running under students' and mess which means we can suggest the food and good quality food is provided. The college has experienced physical education professors and is well-equipped with materials needed for sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Dairy Science and Technology, Idukki - Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences UniversityReviewed on 28 Feb 2023)
reviews.review_heading: I am dissatified because basic needs are not available in this college.
reviews.review_text: It is a small college with no basic facilities. Hostels are available but the mess is not available. Lab, library, and classrooms are available. Rooms are small, but they are improving. Wi-Fi and other facilities are only for office use. Hostel is very congested. Classrooms are very small.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2018Offered by College of Dairy Science and Technology, Mannuthy - Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences UniversityReviewed on 1 Sep 2019)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for studies but not in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure, and there were almost all labs like microbiology, computer lab, chemistry and technology labs. Classrooms were neat and clean. One of the main attractive things in our college is its good library, which has books that help students to learn better. There were separate hostels for both boys and girls, and the food available at the hostel has good quality. The college also gives importance to sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by College of Veterinary and Animal Sciences, Mannuthy - Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences UniversityReviewed on 1 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Provides great opportunities in the veterinary field.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in the college, and classrooms are spacious. The central laboratories are accredited by NABL. There are two large libraries, computer labs, farms, feed mills, and more. A BSL-3 laboratory is also coming up. Hostels have improved facilities, including Wi-Fi, a TV room, a large number of rooms, good healthy food, and proper hygiene. There are a total of five hostels for UG students, two for PG and Ph.D. students, and a new hostel building is under construction.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by College of Dairy Science and Technology, Idukki - Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences UniversityReviewed on 29 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and eco friendly campus. Satisfied because of good placements in 2018 and 19.
reviews.review_text: The campus is eco-friendly and has a good climate. The classrooms and lab facilities are available for each departments. Wi-Fi is available in the college. A plant and incubation centre is working with the college. Library facility is available. The hostel facilities are good. The mess food is also good. Mess menu is as per the students need. Sports and games are also there like table tennis, badminton, football etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by College of Dairy Science and Technology, Mannuthy - Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences UniversityReviewed on 1 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculties also have good campus life
reviews.review_text:
Good ..have well finished labs in each departments..and got accredition from aicte
Hostel mess  is providing good  quality food
Hostel and college has Wi Fi facilities,
College has smart classrooms ,library facilities too. Sports, games activities are highly appreciating

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by College of Dairy Science and Technology, Thiruvananthapuram - Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences UniversityReviewed on 13 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are available with good flooring and painting. Campus is neat and clean. Hostel mess is good and serves different and healthy food items for students from other states. There are grounds for physical fitness and healthy life.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by College of Dairy Science and Technology, Mannuthy - Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences UniversityReviewed on 27 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It had good placements in the previous years.
reviews.review_text: The college building is new, and the labs are equipped with all the necessary instruments to help you with the practicals. The college also has a good library, where you can find essential books. The hostel building is old and has its limitations. Wi-Fi is provided in the hostel. The food quality in the mess is also good. Sports and games are conducted every year. Games include volleyball, football, and badminton.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by College of Dairy Science and Technology, Thiruvananthapuram - Kerala Veterinary and Animal Sciences UniversityReviewed on 10 Aug 2020)
reviews.review_heading: The campus life is quite enjoyable.
reviews.review_text: Our labs are superb. We have all types of equipment for practicals. But we don't have Wi-Fi. Our hostel is superb and it is always clean. Our library is quite modern. We have all the books related to our course in the library. Food available in our mess is not bad. We have ground for games practice.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: 72% of students were placed in my course; the highest package in my college is 4 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are HCL, etc. Only 50% of students got internship in my college; their top roles are data scientists, etc. Placements at my college are not good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my college was bad; there is no minimum good things; the quality of food is very bad; and the quality of beds are not good the hostel rooms are the worst; there are no medical facilities; and the accommodations are bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The Environment, Study and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: 75% of Students were placed in Computer Science and Engineering at my college. TCS, Wipro, HCL, DXC, and Teach Mahindra is the top company recruiting in my course. Software Skills and innovative ideas are roles offered. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. 5% of students get internships in Computer Science.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled which can be accessed by students and staff members in the academic block, corridors, and hostels. The classrooms are very spacious and good environment, the college surroundings are very beautiful scenario and greenery. The college takes pride in being a different-able friendly campus with new roads, huts for relation and washrooms added to the building. The library is attached to the main civil block, the library is Wi-Fi Wi-Fi-enabled unit with a seating capacity for about 200 readers divided between two floors. The Girls Hostel provides accommodation for 150 students and providing delicious food. Good environment in the hostel. The fully Wi-Fi-enabled hostel has a furnished room and a separate dining hall with a TV. Every year college conducts EPL. In this EPL all departments are participating, It is very interesting to see everyone encouraging their departments and staff also participating in this EPL. The college has teams for cricket, volleyball, kabaddi, shuttle, chess etc. The college-operated canteen has a seating capacity of 100 people. The college canteen is a popular meeting place for students serving a variety of dishes at moderate prices. The college provides medical facilities also.

faqs.answer: BVC Engineering College, Odalarevu has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. It provides good food. The hostel has good ground. Classrooms are good. They have fans and good furniture. Labs are good with all equipment. The hostel provides snacks in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is very good and good quality education is given.
reviews.review_text: In my Mechanical department, classrooms are very clean and good. We have hardware labs that are good. In my college, Wi-Fi is also available. I don't know about hostels; I use the bus facility. The canteen is also so good. The food is very good in quality. The medical facilities are good, and an ambulance is also there.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my faculty and with my college but for hostel, food wise, I am quite uncertain.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there are total 4 labs with fully functional computers with internet and webinar. In hostel, the quality of food is quite poor and little bit of hygiene problem with hostel cook staff is also there. In our room, there are full internet facilities and ACs.

reviews.review_heading: Good college gives you good education with great ethics.
reviews.review_text:
We have a central library which contains all textbooks and content of syllabus, information about internships and other successful magazines. 
The laboratories we have are excellent and the faculty members are also experts in teaching. The classrooms have good furniture and peaceful environment in class without any disturbance. 
The hostel was good actually. The food they are providing is also good and healthy. 
The medical facilities are good .

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a beautiful environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are excellent like Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and library. Hostel and canteen food is healthy. According to sports and games are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good and is very peaceful and helpful for us.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good. Labs and classrooms are neat and clean. Wi-Fi is excellent. Hostel is good. The food is healthy and good, and we have a health center in our college. Many sports meets and fests are conducted in our college.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Neelkanth Group of Institutions:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good in our college because faculty members work hard.

review_content.Placements: The placements of Neelkanth college are very good. My senior batch has 40 students and all the students are placed in top MNCs like Wipro, TCS, HCL, etc. The highest salary package offered is 9.12 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5.75 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.52 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has sprawling hostels for boys. These hostels include air-conditioned rooms as well. The hostel rooms are adequately ventilated and well maintained. Adequate security arrangements have also been made with its operation overseen by an on-site head of the institution. Comfortable and spacious rooms. The modern and hygienic kitchen serves nutritious and healthy food. There is 24x7 security, Wi-Fi connectivity with round-the-clock internet facility, a standby power generator that provides a non-stop water supply, medical attention, general items kiosk, playgrounds, and a gymnasium in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good studies, but placement offers are not reachable to students.

review_content.Placements: Almost 10% of the students are placed in our college in local computer science companies. The salary packages offered range from 1 LPA to 2 LPA. Local companies visit the campus to hire students from the computer science stream. No student got an internship from any course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college area is about 20 acres and inside we have a beautiful cricket ground. Our college building is four-storied and the condition of the classrooms is very good. Each classroom is 20 feet in length and breadth. We also have a polytechnic college building on our campus which is also a four-storied building.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

review_summary.college_name: Neelkanth Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a good campus and provides average placements for students.

content.Placements: A few of my friends were placed in average companies. They worked there for one year. This institute provides average placements where students should gain experience and improve their communication skills so they can achieve more success in their lives.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided the best facilities, like good libraries. The canteen had all the necessary items. The mess food was average in taste and quality. Overall, the college iwa good in terms of facilities.
content.Faculty: Teachers were always helpful in every situation involving our studies and other problems. They taught students very well and took extra classes for weak students at exam time or before exams. They always complete their courses on time and also revise the syllabus in brief when it's possible and clear our doubts very well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college lacks a good faculty.

content.Placements: The overall placement scenario in the college is average. For B.Tech CSE, the placements are not very amazing. The average package offered in my course is 3 lakhs per annum. The college maintains proper discipline with rules and regulations.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Hostel food is not good and the hostel warden is not very friendly with students. The food quality in the mess is also not up to the mark.
content.Faculty: The faculty of the college is not so great. Teachers lack proper knowledge about any programming language. They only provide theoretical knowledge and no practical knowledge is provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good in our college because faculty members work hard.

content.Placements: The placements of Neelkanth college are very good. My senior batch has 40 students and all the students are placed in top MNCs like Wipro, TCS, HCL, etc. The highest salary package offered is 9.12 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5.75 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.52 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has sprawling hostels for boys. These hostels include air-conditioned rooms as well. The hostel rooms are adequately ventilated and well maintained. Adequate security arrangements have also been made with its operation overseen by an on-site head of the institution. Comfortable and spacious rooms. The modern and hygienic kitchen serves nutritious and healthy food. There is 24x7 security, Wi-Fi connectivity with round-the-clock internet facility, a standby power generator that provides a non-stop water supply, medical attention, general items kiosk, playgrounds, and a gymnasium in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good studies, but placement offers are not reachable to students.

content.Placements: Almost 10% of the students are placed in our college in local computer science companies. The salary packages offered range from 1 LPA to 2 LPA. Local companies visit the campus to hire students from the computer science stream. No student got an internship from any course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college area is about 20 acres and inside we have a beautiful cricket ground. Our college building is four-storied and the condition of the classrooms is very good. Each classroom is 20 feet in length and breadth. We also have a polytechnic college building on our campus which is also a four-storied building.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with college in Meerut, and 95% of the students get campus placements.

content.Placements: The highest academics percentage secured by the students is 90%, and the minimum is 60%. Most of students secured above 75% of marks in their academics. The highest salary package of the college is 13 LPA and the minimum salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Tech Mahindra Ltd, Genpact, Ashoka Leyland, Just Dial, Optra Automation, etc. Our college offers B.tech, Diploma, BBA and BCA courses.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are very good with 24x7 lights and water. The campus is lush green. The canteen is huge, and they serve fresh food. Medical facilities and an ambulance are available here in case of emergency. Sports classes are also held on our campus, and especially cricket ground is huge where every year tournaments are held.

admission_overview.college_name: Neelkanth Group of Institutions Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: Neelkanth Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Neelkanth Group of Institutions admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Neelkanth Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.Ed, B.A. B.Ed, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 81,000 - 2,44,800. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

Candidates are offered admission in B.E. / B.Tech based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers B.E. / B.Tech in specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 2,13,900 - 2,44,800. faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BBA at Neelkanth Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BBA programme at Neelkanth Group of Institutions is merit-based. Candidates are shortlisted based on their Class 12 marks. There is no entrance examination required. hostel_campus.college_name: Neelkanth Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good campus and provides average placements for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided the best facilities, like good libraries. The canteen had all the necessary items. The mess food was average in taste and quality. Overall, the college iwa good in terms of facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college lacks a good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Hostel food is not good and the hostel warden is not very friendly with students. The food quality in the mess is also not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good in our college because faculty members work hard.
reviews.review_text: The college has sprawling hostels for boys. These hostels include air-conditioned rooms as well. The hostel rooms are adequately ventilated and well maintained. Adequate security arrangements have also been made with its operation overseen by an on-site head of the institution. Comfortable and spacious rooms. The modern and hygienic kitchen serves nutritious and healthy food. There is 24x7 security, Wi-Fi connectivity with round-the-clock internet facility, a standby power generator that provide...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good studies, but placement offers are not reachable to students.
reviews.review_text: Our college area is about 20 acres and inside we have a beautiful cricket ground. Our college building is four-storied and the condition of the classrooms is very good. Each classroom is 20 feet in length and breadth. We also have a polytechnic college building on our campus which is also a four-storied building.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college in Meerut, and 95% of the students get campus placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are very good with 24x7 lights and water. The campus is lush green. The canteen is huge, and they serve fresh food. Medical facilities and an ambulance are available here in case of emergency. Sports classes are also held on our campus, and especially cricket ground is huge where every year tournaments are held.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure and facilities being provided.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of our college is the best as it creates a good environment to study. The labs and
classrooms are well-maintained and are cleaned regularly. The library has all the books being used by students. The college provides sports and games facilities for students. The quality of food is good, and the mess is clean. The hostels provided for the students are also good, and all the facilities are provided there. The food provided to the hostel students is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because I learned many things which will be very useful in future.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many good facilities. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled.  The college has almost 100 classrooms. There are different libraries for different departments. Our college has a large sports ground, and all the sports facilities are provided. Quality of food served in the canteen is good with reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. There are 3 buildings for different courses, and the college also has a playground, an assembly ground and a shaded hall. The cafeteria is very good, and there is a hostel on the campus, so it is easy to come to the college for students who reside in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Neelkanth institute of technology is best college for take a admission and I think maximum students.
reviews.review_text:
In my college very facilities given by college to all the students like our library is so good every addition book is available in our library and all the labs is highly technical and medical services also available in my college
Sports and another activity also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: With no doubt, it's one of the good colleges in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Good and green type of infrastructure is present, and you will never get bored while going to this college. A perfect library, full Wi-Fi connectivity, an enjoyable canteen, all sports facilities are available. Labs are excellent with all equipment and machines for all branches and has skilled assistants.

reviews.review_heading: Extremely happy with college, very good infrastructure and very good teaching methods.
reviews.review_text: The Neelkanth College has a smart classroom for the modern way of teaching. There are fully air-conditioned classrooms. There is an availability of LCD projectors in each classroom. The systemised way of teaching is done. Use of right-tech an up to date technologies, extremely rich and properly managed library with audio-visual facilities. 24*7 Wi-Fi facility and well-equipped computer labs are available. Grooming facilities, communication labs, seminar halls, conference rooms, sports room, and ...

reviews.review_heading: satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi labs, classroom, library medical facility, sport and game, etc. are available in my college. The cricket academy integrated by Virendra Sehwag and many international cricketers visited my college like Mine Ali. Good quality of lab and classrooms. Good quality food is available in the canteen. The hostel rooms are better.

reviews.review_heading: Neelkanth Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure includes a very well groomed library, and fully Wi-Fi enabled campus. There is 24*7 ambulance service. A great playground which consists of a cricket ground, basketball court, badminton court, two volleyball courts and one kabaddi ground are available. The canteen is not an attraction, while the mess and hostel are satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: A review that helps you for higher education.
reviews.review_text: We can say that a good infrastructure is also important for a good college. A student wants fantasy, education and a better environment, we can say it is a bit necessary for all the students. The infrastructure of the college was pretty impressive, and the playgrounds were fine as it was top maintained in the city. It has all types of courts like badminton, basketball, throw ball, etc. There is a huge library, well-maintained labs, free Wi-Fi also available here.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Neelkanth Institute of Technology (NIT)
reviews.review_text:
Well-maintained library and computer labs. In our classrooms, there is a projector for studying. We used to watch corporate videos. 
There is also small hut shaped canteen but they provide good food.

faqs.answer: A:    College of Engineering, Cherthala has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech, MCA which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, IT & Software. College of Engineering, Cherthala has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by College of Engineering, Cherthala?

faqs.answer:
A:    College of Engineering, Cherthala has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.Tech./B.E. in Applied Electronics & Instrumentation/ Electronics & Communication/ Electronics & Instrumentation/ Instrumentation/ Electrical & Electronics/ Electronics/ Electronics & Bio Medical Engineering approved by the AICTE/ Deemed Universities in India.
For SC/ST candidates a pass in the Engineering Degree course is sufficient. 
Candidates who have appeared for the final semester examination can also apply.
Candidates, who have passed AMIE / AMIETE Examinations and satisfying the following conditions, are eligible for admission.
1) They must have valid GATE score
2) A minimum of 55% marks for section B in AMIE/ AMIETE examinationB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 17 years of age as on the 31st December 2023.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by College of Engineering, Cherthala are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at College of Engineering, Cherthala goes up to 432.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a pass percentage above 95%.

review_content.Placements: About 95% of students from this batch were placed in different companies. Companies like Razorpay, Technologies, 6D Technology, etc. hire during this year. I also think the students placed in these companies are offered good packages. I think the starting salary was somewhere like 50–70k.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are different hostels for each year's students. The food in some hostels is provided by the hotels near them. The boys from the hostel play football almost daily on college grounds. There are like 4 or 5 hostels. They are close to the college. The Wi-Fi is bad .

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: An average college has low academic standards and placement.

review_content.Placements: There is an average placement, but salary packages are low; the average salary per year is about 2–3 LPA. The major companies are TCS Teachers Book, etc. There are almost 30 percent of students who will get placement. The highest package in college history is 16 LPA by rapzazor company in 2020. placement sometimes goes to 7 LPA also.
review_content.Infrastructure: The main positive of this college is that it has good infrastructure. There are lot of computer labs with high facilities, as well as a mechanical lab, electrical lab, electronics lab, etc. Lab facilities are very standard. The faculty members are also nice. The academic structure is bit tough. There is a hostel facility provided by our college. Every year, there are separate hostels. The hostel food is not upto to par; it is below average. Sport facilities are very good.

content.Placements: About half of the students from a batch are placed yearly in companies like Infosys, Wipro, and Suntech, etc., which are not product-based companies, but rather service-based. So, viewing from the perspective of placements, not a lot of good companies are there for recruiting. Even though the placement process is hard, there is a placement cell which prepares students for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: I would say the infrastructure is somewhat okay for an institution, and it contains necessary facilities like a library, canteen, toilets for both men and women, sick rooms, labs, classrooms with projectors, Wi-Fi, playground, etc. As the hostel is near the college, students can use the canteen for food and the library to study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College of Engineering Cherthala review.

content.Placements: The training and placement cell does an excellent job in preparing students for placement, and it's working well. Around 70 or 80 students who completed their courses in 2024 got placed in different companies, and many third-year students are receiving offers. The highest package offered was around 20 LPA, and the minimum is 4 LPA. TCS and UST Global are some of the recruiting companies. As a computer science and engineering student, I've seen most of my peers placed as software engineers, web developers, etc. Some also found placements in other fields.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has a pass percentage above 95%.

content.Placements: About 95% of students from this batch were placed in different companies. Companies like Razorpay, Technologies, 6D Technology, etc. hire during this year. I also think the students placed in these companies are offered good packages. I think the starting salary was somewhere like 50–70k.
content.Infrastructure: There are different hostels for each year's students. The food in some hostels is provided by the hotels near them. The boys from the hostel play football almost daily on college grounds. There are like 4 or 5 hostels. They are close to the college. The Wi-Fi is bad .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An average college has low academic standards and placement.

content.Placements: There is an average placement, but salary packages are low; the average salary per year is about 2–3 LPA. The major companies are TCS Teachers Book, etc. There are almost 30 percent of students who will get placement. The highest package in college history is 16 LPA by rapzazor company in 2020. placement sometimes goes to 7 LPA also.
content.Infrastructure: The main positive of this college is that it has good infrastructure. There are lot of computer labs with high facilities, as well as a mechanical lab, electrical lab, electronics lab, etc. Lab facilities are very standard. The faculty members are also nice. The academic structure is bit tough. There is a hostel facility provided by our college. Every year, there are separate hostels. The hostel food is not upto to par; it is below average. Sport facilities are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Life in this college is average and it is not that good or bad. Not that much stress.

content.Placements: In this college, about 40% of the students got placed each year. Some of the top recruiters visiting our college are TCS, Global Quest, IBS, and Impaqive. The top roles are full stack developer, and software developer positions on placements. The lowest package is 2.4 LPA. The highest package is 16 LPA. 1–2% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Everyone have access to Wi-Fi. We have advanced computer labs. The classrooms have projectors. The canteen is small and below average. There are very few medical facilities. The library contains all the books related to academics. The sports are conducted once a year and are less encouraging.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in College of Engineering, Cherthala for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
College of Engineering, Cherthala has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.Tech./B.E. in Applied Electronics & Instrumentation/ Electronics & Communication/ Electronics & Instrumentation/ Instrumentation/ Electrical & Electronics/ Electronics/ Electronics & Bio Medical Engineering approved by the AICTE/ Deemed Universities in India.
For SC/ST candidates a pass in the Engineering Degree course is sufficient. 
Candidates who have appeared for the final semester examination can also apply.
Candidates, who have passed AMIE / AMIETE Examinations and satisfying the following conditions, are eligible for admission.
1) They must have valid GATE score
2) A minimum of 55% marks for section B in AMIE/ AMIETE examinationB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 17 years of age as on the 31st December 2023.

reviews.review_text: My college has almost all the necessary facilities, including proper labs, a library, washrooms, and clean classrooms. The college is large, spread over 25 acres, with ample space for students to relax. The labs have all the required equipment, and the computer labs are excellent. I'm not a hosteller, b...

reviews.review_heading: A calm and quite atmosphere to learn and get good placements.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are smart classrooms and Wi-Fi is there all over the college. There are several labs consisting new systems. Availability of boys hostel is difficult. Also there is a good canteen in the campus. Library consists of various technical books of different streams.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. It only has a total of 5 buildings, and it does not give you a total vibe of college. The library is not big, but it provides books for all major entrance exams. All the classrooms are big and provided with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life was more enjoyable in this college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is lush green. The buildings are painted red and cream colors. The college uses solar energy alternate power source. The classrooms are neat and have good power backup. It has a good computer lab, auditorium, dining area, food court etc. The hostels are very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to take admission. It gives good opportunities to get placed in good companies.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are available here. The library is well maintained and has a good reading room, which is very calm and quiet. All labs are well managed and arranged. There is a huge ground at the front side of the college, where sports day is conducted. Our college doesn't have a hostel. However, there are many places to stay nearby our college. There are a nice environment and atmosphere in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a highly recommended college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered by the college are very much satisfactory at the current time, and the facilities increase year by year. Government funding is provided on a fixed time basis. The college provides Wi-Fi facility for students. The hostel is located adjacent to the college, and it also provides good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Environment friendly campus with good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is rather creative. It is built in such a way that the satellite view of our college rhymes with a usual satellite. The hostel facilities are of high quality and homely food is been serving as of right now. The canteen facility is one of the best in the college, and no complaints have been heard. The medical facilities are also quite good. Also, the playgrounds are there for cricket, football, volleyball, badminton court. All together makes the course looks good...

reviews.review_heading: More than satisfied with the facilities, pretty impressive placement record, excellent facility.
reviews.review_text: There's a full Wi-Fi available throughout the campus. The labs are equipped with excellent materials and qualified technicians. The library provides with all the required study materials and there's enough supply for each student. The classrooms have more than enough facilities to enhance the teaching and learning experience thanks to the presence of more than enough seating arrangements and projectors in each classes etc. The college itself provides hostel services to those who come from far aw...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the current placement level in the college, and the teacher student interaction.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi access of has a speed of about 1Gbps. The lab facilities and classrooms are great. Library offers a great variety of books. Canteen food quality is great. Sports and arts festival are conducted regularly. Hostel facilities are provided for girls.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, placement drives are very impressive and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all the necessary facilities and infrastructure needed for students like Wi-Fi all over campus and made available by the college authorities, there's more than enough classrooms for 500+ students, and 90% of all the classrooms are equipped with projectors and projector screens. Library contains books of all available subjects offered in our college they also have magazines related to courses. A new block has just been inaugurated by Kerala's Chief Minister, and the new block also...

reviews.review_heading: Calm Atmosphere |Good Placements in 2019 | Fed Up of the syllabus and university.
reviews.review_text: There is both Boys and Girls hostel facility provided by the college. Students also stays in other places like Homestays near the college. The college provides a very high-speed internet connection, every students can access this facility through laptops, but accessing Wi-Fi through mobile is prohibited. The labs in our college is pretty decent. The college has a library with a huge collection ofbooks, but some books in the library are outdated (Everything related to computers get outdated quick...

With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Science. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech, BBA and B.Voc. PW Institute of Innovation, Noida fee structure ranges between INR 3,30,000 to 8,36,000.

faqs.answer: A:    PW Institute of Innovation Noida offers UG level courses in full-time regular mode. The Institute offers respective courses for the durations varying from 3 years to 4 years. The respective courses are offered on the basis of valid scores of accepted entrance exams such as CEE/ JEE/ NEET/ CUET/ IPMATor other equivalent national-level exams. PW Institute of Innovation Noida offers these courses with a total course fees ranging from INR 3.30 Lacs to INR 8.36 Lakh. Considering other private institute course fees, the PW Institute of Innovation Noida offers the respective courses at a comparatively affordable price.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of Technology:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MBA/PGDM. Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of Technology fee structure ranges between INR 1,68,142 to 3,53,976.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and education system.

review_content.Placements: Around 89% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 15 LPA - 20 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is around 10-12 LPA. Around 50-70% of students got internships from our course in top companies at national and international levels. Top 4 companies are recruiting our college and course students for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms such facilities and fresh environment infrastructure are available for our course or department. Facilities in our hostel are also very hygienic. Medical facilities are available for hostel students immediately. Our college achieved many national and international levels of prizes in sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: If you are a mechanical engineering student then this college for you.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 6.5 LPA, the lowest was 2 LPA, and the average package was 3 LPA. Eighty percent of students were placed. Top recruiting companies included Vishay Components India Pvt. Ltd, Afcons Infrastructure, Tata Housing, Bharat Forget Limited and Lakshmi Precision Screws.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs were in good condition and well-equipped. Wi-Fi was available for office use. Hostels were available for both boys and girls but the food quality at the mess was not so good. The canteen was not so good either. But the best thing was the library which was big enough.

overview_faqs.question: Is Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of Technology a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of Technology is a well-known institution for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of Technology has a rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 3.2 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 3.5 on Infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is nice, and facilities are also nice. I recommend this college.

content.Placements: Here, 30 students were placed out of 40. Placement is average. Highest package is 12 LPA, and lowest package is 4 LPA. Here, some communication companies, such as Wipro, are listed. Students are given proper training of interviews. More students are placed by placement cell, which is nice.
content.Infrastructure: There are two hostels, one for first year and another for second year, third year, and final year. First-year hostel has common toilets, and other hostel has an attached bathroom. All things are properly worked. They have a separate girls' hostel and hot water 24 hours a day for batch.

content.Faculty: All the teachers in the college are qualified, helpful to students, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is amazing. The semester exams and mid-sem exams in our college are difficult. The pass percentage is 60%.

highlights.summary: Jharkhand University of Technology is an university located in Ranchi, Jharkhand. Jharkhand University of Technology courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Jharkhand University of Technology offers a total of 32 courses in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Hospitality & Travel. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and BCA and the total seat intake for the available courses is 90. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Control Systems and Cyber Security. Further, the fee for all these courses is INR 27,420. Apart from this, the Jharkhand University of Technology campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

review_content.Placements: My branch of electrical is having a decent placement as per 2025 report, with a median of around 6.5 LPA. Placement percentage is around 75 percent. Around 90 percent placement for its core branch like mechanical, mental mining, and for tech branch mass recruiters are major hiring MNCs.
review_content.Infrastructure: For the first year, hostels are good. It has 2 sharing but from second year onwards, it would be 4 sharing. Infrastructure is decent but it needs to be upgraded. There are two libraries, one is central library and other is GRS library present on the campus.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: How to apply for PSU jobs after possessing M.Tech Metallurgical Engineering degree?
faqs.answer: To secure a job in top PSUs such as GAIL, NTPC, ONGC, CIL, Hindalco etc. candidates can either apply in the direct recruitment such as Recruitment for Management Trainee or apply from their portal. Another method of recruitment is to qualify GATE which is considered as a screening criteria for recruitment in various job positions. Candidates must aim at maximizing their scores in GATE in order to secure a job in PSUs.Know more about -Metallurgical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: How to become Assistant Engineer (AE) after pursuing BTech in Metallurgical Engineering?
faqs.answer: Candidates who want to become AE in the Metallurgical Department of various states will be required to clear the required exam with a decent score and then participate in various processes. They must ensure that they possess a genuine BTech degree inMetallurgical Engineeringand must gain relevant experience through internships or training assignments. They must appear for GATE examination and apply for Assistant Engineer positions by clearing the entrance examination for recruitment.

college_info.college_name: Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in offline mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MCA. Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,16,940 to 7,44,444.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good college but poor placement facilities.

review_content.Placements: Our college has fewer placements; above 50 percent of students got placed in our college. The highest package is 6 lakhs per annum and the lowest package is 2 lakhs per annum. The top companies visited our college are HP, TMF, etc. The top roles offered in our course are data analyst, software developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and facilities are available in our college. They provide labs with new equipment, classrooms with smart boards, the library is provided. The hostel facility is better, and they provide food facility. There is no Wi-Fi facility available in both college and hostel, a medical kit is provided in the hostel. Sports and cultural activities are conducted for every semester.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bheemanna khandre institute of technology.

review_content.Placements: Every year, the passing percentage of our college was above 90%; the highest package was INR 5 lakh per year, and the lowest package was INR 1.8 lakh per year. Companies like ACC, Tata Consultancy, Hp and Chettinad Cement Factory, as well as good contractors, are hiring students.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, they provide the laundry facilities and the thing about the hostel is that they provide quality food and good hostel facilities and games and sports are eventful. The sports and games activities are going on once a year, and overall, they provide good facilities.
