review_summary.college_name: Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is good for EC and mechanical engineering.

content.Placements: Only electronics and communication and mechanical branch students are getting placed. Not granted placements for other branch students. It is not worth it for computer science student so I chose to take a computer science engineering. It's one of the famous degrees in engineering field.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good in hostel. The food sometimes is not good, and the food is not eatable. Wi-Fi facility is not available sometimes. The hot water problem is there and 24/7 watchman facility is also good. Security guards will shift night and day, they take care of us. Lab facility is good, even library facility is also good. College infrastructure is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E.in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and Campus .

content.Placements: I am from the 2021 scheme batch of B.E in CSE (AIML). 10% of students got placed in my course, and 100% in chemical engineering. The highest package is 6 lakhs, the lowest is 3 lakhs, and the average is 3.80 lakhs. Sai, Infosys, HCL, Wipro, DHL, TCS, and Tech Mahindra, etc., are some of the recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, an average hostel, green boards and whiteboards in classrooms, seminar halls, and a huge library. It also has a sports and gymnastics department, a music department, and a canteen. High-tech labs and Wi-Fi are provided, with required LAN speeds of 100 Mbps.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college but poor placement facilities.

content.Placements: Our college has fewer placements; above 50 percent of students got placed in our college. The highest package is 6 lakhs per annum and the lowest package is 2 lakhs per annum. The top companies visited our college are HP, TMF, etc. The top roles offered in our course are data analyst, software developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and facilities are available in our college. They provide labs with new equipment, classrooms with smart boards, the library is provided. The hostel facility is better, and they provide food facility. There is no Wi-Fi facility available in both college and hostel, a medical kit is provided in the hostel. Sports and cultural activities are conducted for every semester.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bheemanna khandre institute of technology.

content.Placements: Every year, the passing percentage of our college was above 90%; the highest package was INR 5 lakh per year, and the lowest package was INR 1.8 lakh per year. Companies like ACC, Tata Consultancy, Hp and Chettinad Cement Factory, as well as good contractors, are hiring students.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, they provide the laundry facilities and the thing about the hostel is that they provide quality food and good hostel facilities and games and sports are eventful. The sports and games activities are going on once a year, and overall, they provide good facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Students, faculty and college are good.

content.Placements: Around 50% of students are placed. The highest package offered is 5 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Students got internships. Top recruiting companies are HP, Cognizance and TMF group.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility and labs are good. Instructors are talented and student friendly. The 24\7 library is open with all the subject books, newspapers and magazines to know about Current Affairs. Quality food is available in the canteen with minimal cost. All rooms have CCTV cameras.
content.Faculty: Teachers are friendly. Highly qualified and makes the students feel comfortable. Their teaching method is good and boosts the confidence of students. Passing percentage is 70% and exams are not tough for those who have studied well.

admission_process.title: Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology admissions2025 is merit-based. To apply for any of the courses at the university, students need to meet the admission criteria for the same. The university offers an extensive range of courses across multiple disciplines, including Engineering and IT and Software, and more. AtBheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology, candidates are selected based on their academic merit. The application forms are available online at the official website of the university. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is good for EC and mechanical engineering.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good in hostel. The food sometimes is not good, and the food is not eatable. Wi-Fi facility is not available sometimes. The hot water problem is there and 24/7 watchman facility is also good. Security guards will shift night and day, they take care of us. Lab facility is good, even library facility is also good. College infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and Campus .
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, an average hostel, green boards and whiteboards in classrooms, seminar halls, and a huge library. It also has a sports and gymnastics department, a music department, and a canteen. High-tech labs and Wi-Fi are provided, with required LAN speeds of 100 Mbps.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but poor placement facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure and facilities are available in our college. They provide labs with new equipment, classrooms with smart boards, the library is provided. The hostel facility is better, and they provide food facility. There is no Wi-Fi facility available in both college and hostel, a medical kit is provided in the hostel. Sports and cultural activities are conducted for every semester.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bheemanna khandre institute of technology.
reviews.review_text: In our college, they provide the laundry facilities and the thing about the hostel is that they provide quality food and good hostel facilities and games and sports are eventful. The sports and games activities are going on once a year, and overall, they provide good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Students, faculty and college are good.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility and labs are good. Instructors are talented and student friendly. The 24\7 library is open with all the subject books, newspapers and magazines to know about Current Affairs.  Quality food is available in the canteen with minimal cost.  All rooms have CCTV cameras.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, and it has really good placements. I love my college.
reviews.review_text: Labs, canteen, library, book store and all are available on our campus. The hostel is also good, and the quality of food served is also very good. Sports facilities are also available, and there is also a gymnasium on the campus. Medical facilities are also available on the campus. If there is an emergency, then an ambulance will be available on the campus for 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the top college in our district.
reviews.review_text: I was a day scholar so I don't have information about the hostel. But the campus was very good. It was covered with trees and grass. Classrooms and labs were well furnished. But the college did not have a good canteen, you have to adjust it.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to get a degree, but to get a job in reputed companies is still a dream.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and library are not as good as they show on their websites. The library doesn't contain good books which are required for us. Our college conducts sports every year. Talking about Wi-Fi, it is a bit slow. As per my consideration, Wi-Fi is not required as everybody uses Jio. Hostels are in good condition, and the mess food is also provided with good quality. Some queries are there regarding the infrastructure, but they can be ignored.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bheemanna Khandre Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, and the hostel environment is beautiful. Our branch classrooms are good with all the facilities. Our college has 2 libraries, one is the main library, while the other one is the branch library. All other facilities like hospitality and mess are good and affordable.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college. I made a mistake, please don't go for that.
reviews.review_text: Nothing is good here. You cannot sit with girls in the library or anywhere on the campus. They will create some rumours about girls' character. Food served here is pathetic. Events are not organised.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in northern Karnataka in terms of faculty, campus, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spread over 32 acres and has lush greenery. Wi-Fi access is provided to all the students. Computer labs are modern and air-conditioned. Mechanical labs are equipped with a number of machines to work on. The electronic department has modern labs. The college has signed an MOU with TCS for conducting different service exams. Students don't need to go to other centres for attending the GATE exam as the college has its own centre in the area. Hostels are available for both boys and gir...

reviews.review_heading: Overall good college only placement issue.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice. Around 35 acres campus is there including canteen, garden & playground. The classrooms have modern table, bench & projector. The labs have all equipment & machinery. Very plus point of this college is infrastructure. I love to show up my college picture.

reviews.review_heading: The campus placement is the only liability to this college.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good, and they are built in such a manner that there will be no disturbance in between the lectures. Wi-Fi also works fine at the administration office, but it is not available all over the campus. The library is too good for those who really use it. The medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with nice infrastructure, cheap college fees and hostel fees.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure is quite satisfactory with all the lab equipment and all the available sports and games department. They have an emergency ambulance van in case of an emergency, and that's a blessing. The canteen is not good as the food they offer is quite bad and the hostel rooms are messy and old, which needs to be renovated.

reviews.review_heading: NAAC B++. Recently it was graded by the NAAC.
reviews.review_text:
Good college arena and a good lab for mechanical. Out of 10, it makes 7.
The infrastructure is satisfactory for CSE and chemical and bad for civil engineering. It is the best for mechanical engineering. 
Overall, it is good.
The college is spread over an area of 44000 Sq. Km.
